title: How To Run A HDD Motor   Or Wire A 3 Phase To Run From A Single Phase
description: for various reasons i want to run a HDD motor without spending a fortune on electronics I don't really understand - so this is how I did it. The same ideas can be used to rewire a 3 phase motor to run on a single phase. The campaign is at http://www.gofundme.com/RobertMurray-Smith. This is based on Andy Reynolds excellent series of videos - the first is here https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6UcDM3hm0XM - he has 5 in all and well worth a watch
